description_long: This nightstand features a classic, elegant design with a single drawer adorned with ornate floral carvings and a decorative handle. The body is rectangular with a slightly overhanging top surface, providing a stable area for placing items. The legs are gently curved, adding a touch of sophistication and vintage charm to the overall appearance. The front panel below the drawer is embellished with additional carved detailing, enhancing its decorative appeal. The sides and back are plain, focusing attention on the intricate front. The finish is a smooth, light gray or off-white, giving it a refined and timeless look suitable for both traditional and urban settings.
description: A classic nightstand with a single ornate drawer, curved legs, and a smooth, light-colored finish. Decorative carvings highlight the front, while the sides and back remain plain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate drawer with a decorative handle and carved detailing beneath, as well as the curved legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, smooth panel and the profile of the curved legs.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a flat, undecorated back panel and the overhanging top surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a plain panel and visible leg curvature.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
